title: The Adept's Challenge
description: Master Helvant declares that your training as an apprentice is complete. To graduate to the rank of Adept, you must pass one final trial - a test of all you've learned. Helvant has prepared a magical challenge that will push you to your limits. Success means recognition as a true practitioner of the arcane arts and access to advanced magical knowledge.

objectives.description: Enter the arcane trial chamber beneath Helvant's tower
objectives.notes: Instanced challenge room beneath his tower in Dalhurst

objectives.description: Defeat the summoned elemental guardians using magic
objectives.notes: Fire, Ice, and Lightning elementals - must use magic to damage
Rune sequence puzzle testing magical knowledge

objectives.description: Face Master Helvant in a non-lethal arcane duel
objectives.notes: Scripted duel - Helvant yields at 25% health, not a true kill objective

objectives.description: Speak with Master Helvant to complete your graduation

spawn_on_accept.notes: Fire elemental - vulnerable to ice magic
Ice elemental - vulnerable to fire magic
Helvant's trial projection - yields when reduced to 25% health

notes: Final quest in wizard apprentice chain. Multi-stage challenge culminating in arcane duel with Helvant. Rewards powerful signature spell (Meteor Storm), upgraded robes (+15 arcana, +50 max mana), and Staff of the Adept (two-handed weapon, +10 arcana, +25% spell damage). Unlocks advanced spell purchases from Helvant.
